issues.description: Condition should be 'TrashCount' (checking Life cards ≤2), not 'HasRestingDon'. Life cards in hand are tracked via TrashCount in OPTCG DSL.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and PowerBoost +1000 has no basis in card text. Card only grants +2000 twice conditionally; no additional +1000 boost exists. This effect should be removed.

Both PowerBoost actions target 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' separately. DSL should target the same card once (chose in first action), then conditionally boost it again. Current structure allows two different targets.
